# VitaBoost+

> Premium herbal immunity supplement made with six time-honoured Ayurvedic
> herbs — Tulsi, Ashwagandha, Ginger, Turmeric, Amla and Giloy. Lab-tested,
> 100% plant-based, delivered across India with Cash on Delivery available.

VitaBoost+ is a direct-to-consumer wellness brand selling a single herbal
immunity capsule. The site is a one-page storefront covering product
benefits, ingredients, usage instructions, customer reviews, FAQs, and an
inline order form.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, benefits, ingredients, reviews, FAQ, and order form.
